app.title: Project Glasswing: Securing critical software for the AI era
app.author: Ryan5453
app.description: A system for identifying vulnerabilities and securing AI models.
proposed_tests: Run a mock vulnerability scan on a known vulnerable model
Measure execution time against an industry-leading tool
